properties.name: spring.outbox.broker
properties.description: The message broker type to use. Supported values: {@code "kafka"}, {@code "rabbitmq"}. Determines which {@link io.github.saumilp.starters.outbox.broker.MessageBrokerAdapter} is auto-configured. Defaults to {@code "kafka"}.

properties.name: spring.outbox.enabled
properties.description: Whether the outbox relay is enabled. Defaults to {@code true}.

properties.name: spring.outbox.kafka-topic-prefix
properties.description: Topic name prefix for the Kafka adapter. The full topic name is {@code kafkaTopicPrefix + eventType}. Defaults to {@code "outbox."}.

properties.name: spring.outbox.max-retries
properties.description: Maximum number of relay attempts before an event is marked {@link io.github.saumilp.starters.outbox.model.OutboxEventStatus#FAILED}. Defaults to {@code 3}.

properties.name: spring.outbox.rabbit-exchange
properties.description: RabbitMQ exchange name for the RabbitMQ adapter. Defaults to {@code "outbox"}.

properties.name: spring.outbox.relay-interval-ms
properties.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between relay polling cycles. The timer resets after each invocation completes, not from its start. Defaults to {@code 5000} ms.
